overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a post-apocalyptic open-world game. A character equipped with weapons and a backpack walks down a rocky mountainside onto an abandoned highway at night, continuing along the cracked asphalt road toward a distant tunnel. The environment features dense forests, distant mountain peaks, and overgrown infrastructure under a dark blue night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountainside with scattered pine trees

events.description: character reaches the edge of the hillside and approaches the paved highway below

agents.ego_description: walking carefully down the rocky slope toward the road, navigating uneven terrain

entered.detail: massive gray rock formation immediately to the right of the path
tall evergreen trees scattered across the mountainside
dark mountain silhouettes visible against the night sky
uneven ground covered in rocks, dirt, and sparse grass

segments.scene_description: The character descends a rocky mountainside at night, navigating uneven terrain with a large boulder to the right and pine trees scattered in the distance. The scene is dark with low visibility except for the moonlit landscape, and the character approaches a paved road visible at the bottom of the slope.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned two-lane highway with overgrown vegetation

events.description: character steps from rocky terrain onto the cracked asphalt highway
speed limit 45 sign comes into view on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the center line of the deserted highway, passing utility poles

entered.detail: cracked two-lane road with faded yellow center lines and grass growing through cracks
white rectangular sign with black text reading SPEED LIMIT 45
wooden telephone pole with crossbars and wires running alongside the road

segments.scene_description: The character transitions onto an abandoned highway, walking along the cracked asphalt with a speed limit sign visible on the right. Utility poles line the left side of the road while distant mountains remain visible ahead. The road is overgrown with grass and weeds, indicating long-term abandonment.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain road approaching rock tunnel entrance

events.description: yellow diamond-shaped tunnel warning sign appears on the right side
road curves to the right as it approaches the tunnel entrance

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway as it curves rightward toward the tunnel

entered.detail: yellow diamond-shaped road sign with black tunnel symbol
steep rock wall rising alongside the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The highway curves to the right as the character approaches a tunnel entrance marked by a yellow warning sign. A steep rock cliff rises on the right side while the road narrows slightly. The speed limit sign is left behind as the character continues toward the dark tunnel opening ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character descends a rugged mountainside and transitions onto a desolate, overgrown highway. It begins with a trek down a rocky slope under a moonlit night sky, navigating past large boulders and scattered pine trees toward a paved road below. As the character reaches the bottom, the terrain shifts to cracked asphalt where the camera follows them past a speed limit sign and utility poles lining the abandoned route. The scene then expands as the highway curves to the right, moving away from the open road and toward a steep rock cliff. Finally, the path narrows as the character approaches a yellow warning sign and the dark entrance of a distant tunnel.
